stories.title: Trump pushes Arab recognition of Israel in Iran deal framework as Rubio reports progress
stories.summary: Trump demanded Arab nations recognise Israel as part of any Iran war settlement. Iran's foreign ministry signalled the Strait of Hormuz crossing would not be free even with a deal. Oil prices slid on hopes the strait may reopen as negotiations intensify.

links.headline: Trump demands Arab nations recognise Israel as part of Iran war deal
links.excerpt: Trump pushed Gulf leaders to sign the Abraham Accords as part of any regional peace framework.

links.headline: Iran says 'no tolls' on Strait of Hormuz, but warns everything has a cost
links.excerpt: ABC's reporter inside Iran — the spokesperson signalled crossing would not be entirely free.

stories.title: At least 20 hospitalised after substance sprayed at Tokyo's Ginza 6 mall
stories.summary: A man sprayed a substance at an ATM in the luxury Ginza 6 shopping centre in Tokyo, sending at least 20 people to hospital. Authorities identified the irritant as likely containing capsaicin from chilli peppers.

links.headline: More than 20 hospitalised after substance sprayed in Tokyo mall
links.excerpt: ABC adds details about the evacuation and the suspected substance analysis.

stories.title: Teals eye party structure to fill Liberal vacuum and counter One Nation
stories.summary: The Teal independents are exploring forming a formal party structure, a move that could reshape Australia's political landscape ahead of the next election by filling the Liberal Party's moderate vacuum.

links.headline: Teals eye party structure to fill Liberal vacuum and counter One Nation
links.excerpt: The Guardian reports on discussions among Teal MPs about forming a formal political party.

stories.title: The BHP files: leaked documents reveal world's biggest miner's climate backtrack
stories.summary: A joint Guardian/Four Corners investigation reveals leaked BHP internal documents showing the mining giant delayed renewable energy rollout and scrapped plans to build a plant that would have drastically cut emissions in the Pilbara.

links.headline: Revealed: the internal memo that slammed the brakes on world's biggest miner's climate push
links.excerpt: Guardian investigation reveals BHP backtracked on decarbonisation across its network of mines.

links.headline: BHP quietly scrapped plan to build Pilbara plant that would have drastically cut emissions
links.excerpt: Exclusive: BHP scrapped a plant that could have dramatically reduced emissions from Pilbara operations.

stories.title: Labor consults on CGT carve-outs as tax reform debate intensifies
stories.summary: PM Albanese confirmed Labor will proceed with changes to negative gearing and capital gains tax. The government consulted with business on possible carve-outs while facing opposition from property groups.

links.headline: Labor consults on CGT carve-outs as businesses call for reset
links.excerpt: Government consults with industry on potential business exemptions to tax reform.

links.headline: Labor presses ahead with CGT overhaul as business lobby cries foul
links.excerpt: SMH adds business reaction and potential impact on the housing market.

stories.title: Xi's banquet diplomacy: Albanese snubbed as China-Australia ties cool
stories.summary: ABC analysis reveals the diplomatic signals behind Xi Jinping's recent visit, with Albanese excluded from key banquet events in a snub highlighting cooling China-Australia relations.

links.headline: Inside Xi's banquet diplomacy and why Albanese missed out on Peking duck
links.excerpt: ABC analysis reveals diplomatic signals behind seating arrangements and menu choices.

stories.title: Lismore flood survivors begin moving homes to higher ground in landmark adaptation project
stories.summary: Residents of Lismore, repeatedly devastated by floods, are moving their homes to higher ground in a landmark community-led climate adaptation project that could serve as a model for other flood-prone areas.

links.headline: Lismore flood survivors begin moving homes to higher ground
links.excerpt: The Guardian reports on the community-led relocation project as a model for climate adaptation.
